name: IntentBench Core
description: A pass/fail benchmark for Converge Protocol intent reconstruction, context intake, evidence discipline, host realism, output routing, and proof boundaries.

scoring.full_pass_requires: A valid real response-eval result for every benchmark case, all with Verdict: Pass.
scoring.axis_summary: Report valid pass/fail coverage by output_profile, trigger_surface, context_surface, evidence_surface, risk_surface, and host_surface.

suites.description: Low-expression intent, over-questioning, output routing, and owner recommendation cases.
Current research, source citation, context trust, high-risk, and completion proof cases.
Host capability, native question UI boundary, fallback, and tool realism cases.
Converge Docs, architecture, dev handoff, and final proof discipline cases.
